steps.title: Use the context clue
steps.content: Filmmakers wanted the public to embrace cinema, and critics could help by comparing film to traditional art forms. That would affect how the public viewed or understood the new medium.

steps.title: Choose the public view
steps.content: A would mean the public added something to cinema, which the passage does not discuss. C suggests copying cinema. D is not idiomatic in this context. The blank needs a phrase for the public's attitude toward or understanding of cinema. The answer is B.
